expectations.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated in the report
expectations.evidence: Report does NOT have a structured 33-item KWCAG2.2 checklist. Instead it lists 20 ad-hoc issues (A01-A20) organized by file, not by the standard 33 KWCAG items. No systematic pass/fail evaluation of all 33 items.

expectations.text: Semantic HTML review section is included in the report
expectations.evidence: No dedicated semantic HTML review section. The report focuses on accessibility issues but does not have a separate semantic HTML analysis section.
Issues include file and line references: 'index.html line 2', 'index.html line 30', 'Card.tsx line 29', 'dashboard.tsx lines 29-31', etc.

expectations.text: report.html file is generated in outputs directory
expectations.evidence: report.html exists with meaningful content (337 lines), structured with file-based issue tables.

expectations.text: report.csv file is generated in outputs directory
expectations.evidence: report.csv exists with 21 rows of issue data including ID, File, Line, Severity, KWCAG Guideline, Issue Summary, Recommendation.

expectations.text: Detected missing alt attribute on img in index.html (line 30)
expectations.evidence: Issue A02 at line 30: 'img element missing alt attribute' with severity Error.

expectations.text: Detected icon buttons without aria-label in dashboard.tsx
expectations.evidence: Issues A04 (lines 29-31) and A05 (lines 34-36): 'Icon-only button with SVG has no accessible name (missing aria-label or screen-reader text)'.

expectations.text: Detected duplicate id=card-item issue in Card.tsx
expectations.evidence: Issue A12 at line 27: 'Static id="card-item" creates duplicate IDs when multiple Card components are rendered'.
